info.title: ScrapeBadger eBay API
info.description: eBay marketplace scraping API for searching active and completed (sold) listings, fetching item details, reviews, sellers, seller listings and feedback, category browsing, autocomplete, and reference data across 18 marketplaces.

get.description: Search an eBay marketplace for active listings.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to a category id.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Clamped to 60, 120 or 240.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Item condition filter.

parameters.name: buying_format
parameters.description: Buying format filter.

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Minimum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: free_shipping
parameters.description: Only return listings with free shipping.

current_bid.description: Current high bid for auction listings; mirrors `price`. Null for non-auction (fixed-price) listings.

sold_date.description: Sale date text as rendered by eBay on the sold card, e.g. "2 Jul 2026". Localized on non-English marketplaces (e.g. "Verkauft 5. Okt. 2024"). Null on active listings.

sold_date_at.description: Best-effort ISO 8601 date parsed from sold_date, e.g. "2026-07-02". Null when the marketplace's date format is not English.

get.description: Search completed/sold listings - eBay's real sold-price history.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to a category id.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Clamped to 60, 120 or 240.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Item condition filter.

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Minimum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

current_bid.description: Current high bid for auction listings; mirrors `price`. Null for non-auction (fixed-price) listings.

sold_date.description: Sale date text as rendered by eBay on the sold card, e.g. "2 Jul 2026". Localized on non-English marketplaces (e.g. "Verkauft 5. Okt. 2024"). Null on active listings.

sold_date_at.description: Best-effort ISO 8601 date parsed from sold_date, e.g. "2026-07-02". Null when the marketplace's date format is not English.

get.description: Get a single eBay listing's full detail.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The eBay listing item id.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

current_bid.description: Current high bid for auction listings; mirrors `price`. Null for non-auction (fixed-price) listings.

end_time_utc.description: Absolute auction end time as a Unix timestamp (float seconds). Null for non-auction listings.

end_time_at.description: Absolute auction end time as an ISO-8601 UTC string (e.g. "2026-06-22T19:50:51Z"). Null for non-auction listings.

buy_it_now_price.description: Buy It Now price for fixed-price listings (mirrors `price`) or auction-with-Buy-It-Now listings. Null for pure auctions.

get.description: Get catalog product reviews shown on an eBay listing.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The eBay listing item id.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for reviews.

get.description: Get an eBay seller's public profile.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The eBay seller username.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

get.description: List the active listings of a single eBay seller.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The eBay seller username.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional keyword filter within the seller's store.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Clamped to 60, 120 or 240.

current_bid.description: Current high bid for auction listings; mirrors `price`. Null for non-auction (fixed-price) listings.

get.description: Get a seller's recent feedback comments.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The eBay seller username.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for feedback.

get.description: List active listings within an eBay category.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The eBay category id.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Clamped to 60, 120 or 240.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results.

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Minimum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

current_bid.description: Current high bid for auction listings; mirrors `price`. Null for non-auction (fixed-price) listings.

get.description: List eBay's top-level category id aliases.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Partial query prefix.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: eBay marketplace domain TLD or alias (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

domain.description: eBay domain TLD for this market (e.g. com, co.uk).
